feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: code after a new functional location is created
entry.content:
Hi,

I am looking for a way to execute code after a new functional location is created (e.g. transaction IL01)

The UserExit ILOM0001 and the BTE PM000070 don't suit because they are triggered too early bevor the new functional location is saved.

The BOR-Object BUS0010 doesn't raise any CREATED-event. Delegating a new ZBUS0010 with such an event didn't help either because the change document object "IFLO" doesn't write changes on creating a new entry in the table IFLOT so no possible entry in transaction SWEC.

Any idea?

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) 

Regards

entry.title: Maintenance Plan migration from ECC to S/4
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have requirement to migrate the existing maintenance plans from ECC to S/4. These maintenance plans have existing orders also generated. Business wants to move all the maintenance plan along with its generated orders into S/4.

If we migrate the plans, then what approach should be taken for deciding on the start date of the plan, also what approach should be taken to migrate the preventive maintenance order.

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Compatible Unit - Integration PS and PM
entry.content:
Hello community! S/4HANA On Premise 2023 or higher, is it possible in the PS module, integrated with the PM or PLM module, to build project design, using the Compatible Units enhancement? Can a project built in a GIS system, using Compatible Units, structure a project in the PS, ensuring integration with the PM, if necessary Opex costs?

Gerenciamento de unidades compatíveis | Portal de Ajuda SAP

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM)PLM Project System (PS)SAP enhancement package for SAP Supply Chain Management

entry.title: View more than 20 packages in a maintenance strategy task list
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

We were not able to see more than 20 packages in maintenance task list. Can you please let me know how to view all maintenance packages in maintenance package tab of a task  list. 

Regards, 

Preeti

entry.title: Link Asset to Project/WBS Element or Maintenance Order
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My customer currently has orders of order type "Standing order" (PM) in the legacy system (SAP ERP 6), on which all costs associated with a certain fixed asset are collected and settled.

This is to be mapped in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. A maintenance order is not necessarily required, as no logistical processes need to be recorded, but only normal costs (invoice, time confirmations, activity allocation, etc.). Projects/WBS elements would even be preferred.

However, it is important to the customer that a fixed asset can be assigned in some way so that the customer knows to which asset the costs are posted. The fixed asset is not the recipient of settlements, but only has an informational character.

In the legacy system, this asset can be assigned via the "Location" tab in the order. From the asset master record, you can access the standing order via Environment->Equipment. In the equipment master, the standing order is then assigned in the "Organization" tab. This gives the customer a connection in both directions.

In S/4HANA Public Cloud, as far as I know, it is no longer possible to create a connection between a fixed asset and an equipment. I also see no other way to assign an order or a WBS element in the asset master record, except for a WBS element as an account assignment element.

Furthermore, I cannot find the possibility to assign an asset directly, neither in a maintenance order nor in a project/WBS element.

Does anyone have experience in a similar topic? Is there possibly a scope item with a functionality that could fulfil these requirements?

Thank you in advance for any tips!

Best regards
Rado

entry.title: Breakdown maintenance implementation
entry.content:
Dear Team, 
Can anyone help on implementation of breakdown maintenance specific for pharma industry 

I can execute the below things 

- Create notification - Order against notification - order confirmation - TECO

To streamline our efforts and ensure a successful deployment, we are seeking your valuable support to obtain crucial information on below points:-

we are seeking your valuable support to obtain crucial information on below points:-

  • Process flow for pharma industries - What is the process flow designed by SAP standard for Pharma industries?
  • QA approval process – does the standard configuration include a QA approval process for the breakdown maintenance module
  • Mail Notification Functionality – is there built-in mail notification functionality in SAP Fiori, facilitating notifications at each stage of the process  
  • Fiori App accessibility – According to SAP standards, the FIORI app is limited to desktop usage for both raising notifications and executing processes

    Regards:-

    Brajendra Bhushan

entry.title: Mass Change functional location of many equipments
entry.content:
Hello,

we have a functional location/equipment structure in our system, which has many equipments underneath a functional location.

From time to time all equipments move from one functional location to another. I'm searching for a mass-transaction to perform this change.

The Equipment-Structure-View from the Functional Location allows to change the functional location, but only one equipment by the other, so not usable for mass changes. The mass-change function of equipments does not include the functional location field.

Any suggestions, how to solve this?

BR Frank

entry.title: Unable to link notification to revnr and show it in WPS1
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to link a revision (REVNR : notification ZA) to M1 notification when i'm creating it.
Thank's to FM ISU_DB_QMIH_UPDATE, I can add REVNR to my M1 notification but I can't show my M1 notification under my Revision in WPS1.
I'm on SAP ECC 770.

Have you an idea please ?

Thank's in advance.

entry.title: When i execute the report MCI5,MCI7 and MCI8 it shows message "no data exist for chosen selection"
entry.content: When i execute the report MCI5,MCI7 and MCI8 it shows message "no data exist for chosen selection". Can you please help me on this.

entry.title: Re: Ask and Comment About the Community Platform and Migration
entry.content:
Dear all

In PM IW 38
I put wrong value in actual work hours how I can changed

entry.title: In case I need to replace some of the parts before the planned maintenance call date
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In case I need to replace some of the parts before the planned maintenance call date

For example Plan 1 Year Plan date : 1-JAN-2024 Complete date : 1-JAN-2024Next Plan : 1-JAN-2025 Item 10 : Replaced belt. Item 20 : Replaced bearing. But Item 10 belt was damage on 1-MAR-2024 and I replaced the belt which meant it didn't go as planned. What do I need to do with my maintenance plan? In the event that I release a maintenance plan (as planned on 1-JAN-2025), if I release on 1-MAR-2024, that means that other plans It will not be processed. In this case, what should I do?

Regard

entry.title: Hi, I am getting an error "No personal master record exists for person 0" in Perform Maintenance Job
entry.content:
Hi,

When I click on "Assign to Me" after selecting an operation in the App "Perform Maintenance Job", 

I am getting an error "No personal master record exists for person 0" 

I have created a personal number for me in PA30.

 

Please guide.

entry.title: Creating multiple PM Malfunction Reports at once
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a question regarding create PM Malfunction Report:

Is it possible to create multiple PM Malfunction Reports at the same time with the same data, but with different equipment? And, how would that work?

Thanks a lot for your help!

Nicole

entry.title: MRS - Cut Assignment
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In MRS Planning Board when we try to perform cut assignment on an operation then we were not able to change the time. The fields are greyed out. Can you please help us on how to change the time.

Regards,

Preeti

entry.title: MRS - Automatic resource assignment
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In MRS Planning Board when we try to create automatic assignment we are getting below error:

Auto. assgmnt creation for demand 0000XXXXXXXXX / 0010 failed; partner is not available
Message no. /MRSS/SGE735

Can you please us create automatic assignment.

Regards,

Preeti

entry.title: Equipment External number Ranges-Issue
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I am facing an issue with Equipment External number Range. 

We wanted to retain the Business's existing Equipment number from their legacy system, so we suggested to have an external number range with a country specific prefix.

Example from Legacy system: CV001

Proposed Solution

Country 1 : S-CV001

Country 2 : P-CV001

Country 3 : A-CV001

The external number range which we have maintained is A0000 to Z9999

It worked for Country 1 and 2, but when we are implementing for country 3, we are getting an error : The Equipment number A-CV001 is not in external number range interval.

Can you please let me know why the system is not allowing for the 3rd case? How to rectify the issue or please suggest a work around?

Regards,

SK

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM)

entry.title: What is generative AI? How is it useful in SAP? What are its application with respect to SAP PM?
entry.content:
What is generative AI? How is it useful in SAP? What are its application with respect to SAP PM?

 

Can someone elaborate it's uses?

entry.title: Additional Functions for Multiple Counter Plans (Master Data)
entry.content:
Dear all,

We would like to activate the additional functions in the customizing for the PM maintenance plans (for multiple counter plans). Once the flag has been set in the customizing, the activation can no longer be changed. Additional fields for the cycle sets and scheduling in the multiple counter plans are then activated and displayed, which can then be used additionally (e.g. in IP01, IP02, IP03). So far so good.

Can someone pls answer technically which functions in the background are newly or additionally activated with this flag? Or are the functions all already activated and the customizing only shows the additional fields in the multiple counter plan for master data maintenance?

Thank you in advance for your answers and help.

kind regards,

Igor

entry.title: how do you change the planning plant for a maintenance plant?
entry.content: Once a Maintenance Plant is created, how can you change the planning plant associated with it? What is the tcode to change for maintenance plant?

How to reverse operation status from JBFI REL to REL for a standing PM order
